title: cestrum alternifolium var. pendulinum
intro: Cestrum alternifolium var. pendulinum, also known as the Weeping Night-Blooming Jasmine, is a flowering plant that belongs to the nightshade family and is native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Weeping Night-Blooming Jasmine include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural sedative. Herbal preparations of Cestrum alternifolium var. pendulinum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
